subcodes.first_line: We desired to make mention of Our loved ones there, whose names have not been uttered before Our Countenance, that they might rejoice in this remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا اردنا ان نذکر اولیائی هناک الذین ما ذکرت اسمائهم لدی الوجه لیفرحوا بذکر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @exhortations and counsels
